subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Night hath descended, and a company from both within and without hath assembled, each one mindful of a matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله شب است و جمعی از خارج و داخل حاضر و هر یک بامری متذکر
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @poems and quotation from poetry, @pain of love; love as veil, @consolation and comfort
